0122212112002010001111022021020001 - ASI: 23

Rules:
  01 = 0 * 1
  10 = 1 * 0
  20 = 2 * 0
  21 = 2 * 1
  22 = 2 * 2
  001 = 0 * 01
  020 = 0 * 20
  021 = 0 * 21
  110 = 1 * 10
  120 = 1 * 20
  0011 = 001 * 1
  0122 = 01 * 22
  2121 = 21 * 21
  02010 = 020 * 10
  11022 = 110 * 22
  020001 = 020 * 001
  01222121 = 0122 * 2121
  12002010 = 120 * 02010
  001111022 = 0011 * 11022
  021020001 = 021 * 020001
  0122212112002010 = 01222121 * 12002010
  001111022021020001 = 001111022 * 021020001
  0122212112002010001111022021020001 = 0122212112002010 * 001111022021020001
